commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a plugin runtime follow-up turn API, a cold-session follow-up run builder, an opt-in gateway-restart plugin, tests/mocks, lockfile wiring, and small qa-lab/test changes.

Reproducibility: yes. The blocking issues are source-reproducible from the PR head against current main: the new restart tool lacks existing restart guardrails, cold follow-up runs omit current session-policy fields, and the qa-lab diff drops a still-supported concurrency path.
commands.review_followup: This is not a safe repair-lane item because the remaining work is a public API and security-sensitive restart design decision, not a narrow mechanical fix.
